lineage.Process: Clip gmw_mng_2020_v4019 country_buffer_1km "C:\Users\z5035059\OneDrive - UNSW\Documents\Accounts_2026\Mozambique\Data\Mangroves\gmw_mng_2020_v4019_clipped.shp" #

ExportFeatures gmw_mng_2020_v4019_clipped "C:\Users\z5035059\OneDrive - UNSW\Documents\Accounts_2026\Mozambique\ArcGIS\Mozambique.gdb\gmw_mng_2020_v4019_clipped" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "ClassID "ClassID" true true false 18 Double 0 18,First,#,gmw_mng_2020_v4019_clipped,ClassID,-1,-1" #

ExportFeatures "Mangrove extent\gmw_mng_2020_v4019_clipped" "C:\Users\z5035059\OneDrive - UNSW\Documents\Accounts_2026\Mozambique\Data\Mangrove extent and condition\Mangrove extent\mangrove_assets.shp" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "ClassID "ClassID" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Mangrove extent\gmw_mng_2020_v4019_clipped,ClassID,-1,-1;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Mangrove extent\gmw_mng_2020_v4019_clipped,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Mangrove extent\gmw_mng_2020_v4019_clipped,Shape_Area,-1,-1" #

Copy "C:\Users\z5035059\OneDrive - UNSW\Documents\Accounts_2026\Mozambique\Data\Mangrove extent and condition\Mangrove extent\mangrove_assets.shp" "C:\Users\z5035059\OneDrive - UNSW\Documents\Accounts_2026\Mozambique\Data\Mangrove extent and condition\Mangrove condition\Working data\Morrumbene\mangrove_assets.shp" Shapefile #
CalculateGeometryAttributes mangrove_assets "Shape_Leng PERIMETER_LENGTH_GEODESIC" # # # SAME_AS_INPUT
CalculateField mangrove_assets Shape_Leng 0 PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

Rename "C:\Users\z5035059\OneDrive - UNSW\Documents\Accounts_2026\Mozambique\Data\Mangrove extent and condition\Mangrove condition\Working data\Morrumbene\mangrove_assets.shp" "C:\Users\z5035059\OneDrive - UNSW\Documents\Accounts_2026\Mozambique\Data\Mangrove extent and condition\Mangrove condition\Working data\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_assets.shp" ShapeFile
DeleteField "Mangrove condition\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_assets" ClassID DELETE_FIELDS

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>Morrumbene_mangrove_assets.shp</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>Asset_ID</field_name><field_type>SHORT</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>

ExportFeatures "Mangrove condition\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_assets" "C:\Users\z5035059\OneDrive - UNSW\Documents\Accounts_2026\Mozambique\Data\Mangrove extent and condition\Mangrove condition\Working data\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_area.shp" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "Asset_ID "Asset_ID" true true false 5 Long 0 5,First,#,Mangrove condition\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_assets,Asset_ID,-1,-1;Shape_Leng "Shape_Leng" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,Mangrove condition\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_assets,Shape_Leng,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,Mangrove condition\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_assets,Shape_Area,-1,-1" #
PairwiseBuffer "Mangrove condition\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_area" memory\outPolyLayer1 "25 Meters" NONE # GEODESIC "0 DecimalDegrees"
CalculateField memory\outPolyLayer1 BUFF_DIST 25 PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
AlterField memory\outPolyLayer1 BUFF_DIST # "Buffer distance in METERS" DOUBLE # NULLABLE DO_NOT_CLEAR
CopyFeatures memory\outPolyLayer1 "C:\Users\z5035059\OneDrive - UNSW\Documents\Accounts_2026\Mozambique\ArcGIS\Mozambique.gdb\Morrumbene_mangrove_area_SummarizeNearby" # # # #

JoinField "C:\Users\z5035059\OneDrive - UNSW\Documents\Accounts_2026\Mozambique\ArcGIS\Mozambique.gdb\Morrumbene_mangrove_area_SummarizeNearby" OBJECTID in_memory\summary_stats FID_Morrumbene_mangrove_area_SummarizeNearby # NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES
DeleteFeatures tempLayerca04ef4f-95a9-4bff-8a7f-5648ff6011df

DeleteField "C:\Users\z5035059\OneDrive - UNSW\Documents\Accounts_2026\Mozambique\ArcGIS\Mozambique.gdb\Morrumbene_mangrove_area_SummarizeNearby" FID_Morrumbene_mangrove_area_SummarizeNearby DELETE_FIELDS
DeleteField "C:\Users\z5035059\OneDrive - UNSW\Documents\Accounts_2026\Mozambique\ArcGIS\Mozambique.gdb\Morrumbene_mangrove_area_SummarizeNearby" ORIG_FID DELETE_FIELDS

SummarizeNearby "Mangrove condition\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_area" "Mangrove condition\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_condition_POI" "C:\Users\z5035059\OneDrive - UNSW\Documents\Accounts_2026\Mozambique\ArcGIS\Mozambique.gdb\Morrumbene_mangrove_area_SummarizeNearby" STRAIGHT_LINE 25 METERS # GEOLOCAL ONLY_INTERSECTING "rh100 Mean;L4A_agbd Mean;L4A_agbd_se Mean;L2B_cover Mean;L2B_pai Mean;L4A_carbono_mgha Mean" ADD_SHAPE_SUM # # NO_MIN_MAJ NO_PERCENT #

ExportTable "Mangrove condition\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_area_SummarizeNearby" "C:\Users\z5035059\OneDrive - UNSW\Documents\Accounts_2026\Mozambique\Data\Mangrove extent and condition\Mangrove condition\Working data\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_area_condition_stats.csv" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "Asset_ID "Asset_ID" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,Mangrove condition\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_area_SummarizeNearby,Asset_ID,-1,-1;Shape_Leng "Shape_Leng" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Mangrove condition\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_area_SummarizeNearby,Shape_Leng,-1,-1;BUFF_DIST "Buffer distance in METERS" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Mangrove condition\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_area_SummarizeNearby,BUFF_DIST,-1,-1;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Mangrove condition\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_area_SummarizeNearby,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Mangrove condition\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_area_SummarizeNearby,Shape_Area,-1,-1;mean_rh100 "Mean rh100" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Mangrove condition\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_area_SummarizeNearby,mean_rh100,-1,-1;mean_L4A_agbd "Mean L4A_agbd" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Mangrove condition\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_area_SummarizeNearby,mean_L4A_agbd,-1,-1;mean_L4A_agbd_se "Mean L4A_agbd_se" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Mangrove condition\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_area_SummarizeNearby,mean_L4A_agbd_se,-1,-1;mean_L2B_cover "Mean L2B_cover" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Mangrove condition\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_area_SummarizeNearby,mean_L2B_cover,-1,-1;mean_L2B_pai "Mean L2B_pai" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Mangrove condition\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_area_SummarizeNearby,mean_L2B_pai,-1,-1;mean_L4A_carbono_mgha "Mean L4A_carbono_mgha" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Mangrove condition\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_area_SummarizeNearby,mean_L4A_carbono_mgha,-1,-1;Point_Count "Count of Points" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,Mangrove condition\Morrumbene\Morrumbene_mangrove_area_SummarizeNearby,Point_Count,-1,-1" #

attr.attrdef: Length of feature in internal units.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
